message:
Fix potential deadlock: drop mutex guard before async channel send

Add explicit drop(guard) in flush_ui_stream_batcher_with_backpressure
to release the StdMutex lock before sending on the async channel. This
prevents a deadlock scenario where the UI forwarder thread needs the
lock to process messages but it's held by the sender waiting for
channel capacity. Also updates Cargo.lock with new dependency versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
